name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State predicates *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ forks \in [1..N -> 0..1]
  /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
  /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
  /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
  \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks *)
     /\ \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ states[i] = "hungry"
        /\ forks[i] = 0
        /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = 0
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 1, ![LEFT(i)] = 1]
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
  \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks *)
     /\ \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ states[i] = "eating"
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![LEFT(i)] = 0]
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = 0
        /\ flag = <<>>


Next == /\ num' = num + 1
        /\ flag' = Append(flag, num)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
        /\ head \in 1..K
        /\ tail \in 1..K
        /\ count \in 0..K
        /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ count = 0

ProducerAction == /\ count < K
                 /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = 1]
                 /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
                 /\ count' = count + 1
                 /\ head' = head

ConsumerAction == /\ count > 0
                 /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 0]
                 /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
                 /\ count' = count - 1
                 /\ tail' = tail

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Append(readers, 1)
        \/ /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
        \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Tail(readers)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, MaxMsg

VARIABLES token, msg

Init == /\ token \in 1..N
        /\ msg \in 1..MaxMsg

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ msg' \in 1..MaxMsg
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
        /\ msg' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE msg

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, msg>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE
VARIABLES retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ file \in Seq
    /\ chunks = [i \in 1..Len(file) \div CHUNK_SIZE |-> SubSeq(file, i, i + CHUNK_SIZE - 1)

            SubSeq(file, i, Len(file))]
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = 0

Next ==
    /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, lastChunk)
    /\ retransmitCount' = IF retransmitCount < MAX_RETRIES THEN retransmitCount + 1 ELSE retransmitCount
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks>>

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount>>

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES clocks, offsets, epsilon

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ epsilon \in Nat
        /\ epsilon > 0

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N :
            /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]]
            /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = offsets[i] + (RandomOffset - epsilon)]
            /\ epsilon' = epsilon
        /\ \E i \in 1..N :
            /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]]
            /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = offsets[i] + (RandomOffset - epsilon)]
            /\ epsilon' = epsilon

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets, epsilon>>

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<>> /\ infected = <<>> /\ Len(known) = Len(infected)

Next == /\ known' = known
      /\ infected' = Append(infected, known)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Client

VARIABLES free, allocated, p

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Client : \E p \in free :
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = \E p' \in Pages : p' \in allocated[c] \cup {p}]
          /\ free' = free \ {p}
        \/ \E c \in Client : \E p \in allocated[c] :
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = \E p' \in Pages : p' \in allocated[c] \ {p}]
          /\ free' = free \cup {p}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

TypeOK == /\ free \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Client : allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Client : \A p \in allocated[c] : p \in Pages
          /\ \A c1, c2 \in Client : c1 # c2 => allocated[c1] # allocated[c2]
          /\ \A p \in Pages : \A c1, c2 \in Client : p \in allocated[c1] /\ p \in allocated[c2] => c1 = c2

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants \in {0,1}^2
        /\ wants = [i \in {0,1} |-> 0]

Next == \/ /\ turn' = 1
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![0] = 1]
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = 0]
        \/ /\ turn' = 0
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![0] = 0]
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = 1]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>
